Notice Of Motion And Motion Forj Protective Order Against Specified Requests In Pltfs' First Set Of Documents Inspection Demands
Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven R. Skirvin for plaintiff and opposing party: John L. Boeger

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Financial Interactive, Inc.'s motion for a protective order is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to requests #1, 3, 4-8. The requests are overbroad and seek information that is irrelevant to the subject matter of the action. The motion is granted in part as to request #13. Defendant is ordered to produce responsive documents from January 1, 2002 to June 30, 2005. If any documents are withheld based on a claim of privilege, they shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log. The motion is granted as to requests #19, 24-27, 38, 39 as the requests are overbroad and seek information that is irrelevant to the subject matter of the action. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
